description: Casting a nullable column to text preserves nullability

columns.name: age_str
columns.note: cast changes type to String but age is nullable, so result is nullable

name: cast_text
query_sql:
-- @name GetAgeAsText
-- @returns :one
SELECT age::text AS age_str FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
